description: Observatory.Heartbeat publishes to PubSub heartbeat + Gateway fleet:heartbeat every 5s. Added to MonitorSupervisor. ProtocolTracker and LiveView subscribe to heartbeat instead of own timers.

Consolidated mount into DashboardState.default_assigns/1. dashboard_live.ex 887->458 lines. Wired FeedComponents.feed_view into command_view via Comms/Feed tab toggle.

subject: Fix shutdown ghost: session aliases + tombstones in EventBuffer

subject: Add uniqueness to recover_jobs startup
description: recover_jobs re-enqueues all pending CronJobs on startup without checking for existing Oban jobs. Add unique constraint or check before insert to prevent duplicates on restart.
goal: No duplicate scheduled jobs after restart
notes: recover_jobs uses unique period 120s per job_id. schedule_once also uses unique.

subject: Update TREE.md at end of each wave
description: lib/ichor/TREE.md is stale. Must be regenerated at the end of every wave to reflect current file structure. Add as a standing task.
goal: TREE.md always reflects current file structure
notes: Updated to 179 files post W1-W4.

subject: Eliminate PipelineMonitor GenServer
description: Per P1 (audit) + O4 (audit:109): PipelineMonitor (623L GenServer) serializes 4 concerns: project discovery, task refresh, health check, mutations. Split into: (1) PipelineQuery pure module for board state + mutations, (2) HealthCheckWorker Oban cron, (3) ProjectDiscoveryWorker Oban cron. Delete GenServer. LiveView reads directly from PipelineQuery. Cross-ref: docs/plans/2026-03-21-architecture-audit.md P1, O4 (line 109).
goal: PipelineMonitor GenServer eliminated, all concerns decomposed into pure modules + Oban workers
notes: Done: PipelineMonitor (623L) decomposed into PipelineQuery pure module + 2 Oban cron workers (HealthCheck, ProjectDiscovery). Dashboard callers rewired. GenServer deleted.

subject: Move Infrastructure Ash resources to correct domains
description: Per DB2 (audit): CronJob -> Factory domain, HITLInterventionEvent -> SignalBus domain. WebhookDelivery stays in Infrastructure (audit does not assign new domain). Mechanical moves: rename modules, update domain registrations, update aliases in callers, update from_ash.ex signal_for clauses. Cross-ref: docs/plans/2026-03-21-architecture-audit.md DB2 (line 36).
goal: CronJob in Factory, HITLInterventionEvent in SignalBus, Infrastructure is pure host/adapter
notes: Done: CronJob moved to Factory, HITLInterventionEvent moved to SignalBus. ash.codegen: no schema changes. 7 callers updated. Committed 19e5c80.

subject: Fix :mes_run_complete wrong signal name
description: runner/modes.ex:61 emits :mes_run_complete but catalog only has :run_complete. Signal is silently lost. Likely a typo.

subject: Add 6 missing catalog entries
description: 6 signals emitted but not in catalog: mes_corrective_agent_spawned, mes_corrective_agent_failed, webhook_delivery_enqueued, webhook_delivery_delivered, hitl_intervention_recorded, mes_run_complete. They fall through to derive() silently.

subject: WebhookDeliveryWorker swallows missing delivery
description: webhook_delivery_worker.ex:17 returns :ok when delivery not found. Oban marks job done. Webhook silently dropped.

subject: AgentProcess registry update failures silently dropped
description: agent_process.ex:175,194,200,228,246 discards AgentRegistryProjection.update results. Dashboard shows stale data.

subject: CronScheduler recover_jobs ignores Oban.insert
description: cron_scheduler.ex:68 Oban.insert inside Enum.each with no result check. Failed recovery is silent.

subject: SyncRunner rescue blanket hides Runner errors
description: sync_runner.ex:22 rescue _ -> :ok hides all Runner.sync_task errors. Pipeline task state can silently fail to propagate.

subject: EventStream ETS concurrent writes from HTTP processes
description: ingest_raw/1 runs in caller process, writes to :public ETS tables without sync. maybe_evict read-then-delete race. Tool duration can be lost.

subject: Runner crash window: Pipeline.complete before run_complete signal
description: Runner crash between Pipeline.complete and run_complete causes ResetRunTasksWorker to reset correctly in-progress tasks.

subject: Clean up 9 orphaned database tables
description: gateway_heartbeats, genesis_adrs, genesis_features, genesis_use_cases, genesis_checkpoints, genesis_conversations, genesis_phases, genesis_sections, genesis_tasks, genesis_subtasks -- all have no Ash resource. Write a migration to drop them.

subject: Verify snapshot-schema alignment
description: 9 hand-written migrations for Ash-tracked tables. Snapshots were added retroactively. Run mix ash.codegen to verify no phantom diffs. Highest risk: pipelines/pipeline_tasks (TEXT IDs from hand-written vs UUID in snapshots).

subject: Replace 15 if/else with pattern matching
description: 11 REPLACE + 4 SMELL findings from if/else audit. Key: event_stream SessionEnd clause, team_watchdog nested if->case, agent_watchdog dedup helper, hitl_relay guard-based handle_call, causal_dag pin operator, mes_tick cond. Full list in audit report.
notes: All 15 fixes applied. Clean compile. Two guard-based function clauses, case with pin operator, cond flattening, with chain, Map.fetch, etc.

subject: Fix 6 pipe operator anti-patterns
description: 3 patterns across 6 occurrences: MapSet.new(Enum.map) in presets.ex, Enum.map_join(Enum.take) x4 in chat.ex, List.first(Enum.sort_by) in tool_failure.ex. All clear improvements.

subject: Replace Map.get anti-patterns with pattern matching
description: 9 findings: agent_watchdog case-with-pin, runner.ex struct field access, pipeline_graph destructure after match, spawn.ex preset destructure, canvas_state struct update syntax, elem() in pipelines. High: 2, Medium: 4, Low: 3.

subject: Add 8 missing @spec declarations
description: 8 public functions missing @spec: tmux.ex (5: capture_pane, list_panes, list_sessions, run_command, socket_args), project.ex (2: hierarchy, latest_brief_text), tmux_discovery.ex (1: infrastructure_session?). Also add @doc to project.ex hierarchy/1 and latest_brief_text/1.

subject: Fix 2 parameter ordering violations
description: team_spec.ex:128 _project_id unused at pos 4 (remove it, update caller spawn.ex:100). entropy_tracker.ex:193 _agent_id unused at pos 2 (move after score or remove).

subject: Fix return value inconsistencies
description: 14 findings. HIGH: TeamSync uses bang Ash calls in rescue (anti-pattern). MEDIUM: Notes.get_note returns nil, Presets.fetch returns bare :error, TeamLaunch asymmetric :ok vs {:ok, name}, 7 nil-returning lookups. LOW: delete_block bare :ok, attach_block collapses errors, Catalog.lookup! naming convention.

subject: Review 20+ rescue blocks for exceptions-as-control-flow
description: Anti-pattern #13 from Elixir docs. 20+ rescue sites across event_bridge, causal_dag, chat, agent_watchdog, event_stream, bus, buffer, discovery, persistence, tmux_discovery. Some legitimate (third-party raise), some should be case/with on return values.

subject: Consolidate scattered Application.get_env calls
description: Anti-pattern #16. Application.get_env in 8+ business modules (team_spec, spawn, memories_bridge, chat, watchdog, entropy_tracker). Should be passed as params or read once at init.

subject: Fix top 5 performance issues
description: CRITICAL: dashboard recompute 6 sequential queries->parallel. HIGH: EventStream tab2list, maybe_evict, registration sequential, tmux_discovery sequential.

subject: Fix exceptions-for-control-flow (11 sites)
description: Highest severity from Elixir docs audit. floor.ex converts exceptions to success tuples, event_bridge.ex blanket rescue masks bugs, causal_dag.ex rescue for expected ETS conditions, application.ex rescue _ on startup. Replace with catch :exit, pre-checks, or proper error tuples.

subject: Fix scattered Runner process interface
description: 3 callers do raw GenServer.call(pid, :deadline_passed?, 1000) on Runner pids. Should expose Runner.deadline_passed?(pid) public API function.

subject: Fix blocking I/O in GenServer callbacks
description: 3 GenServers do blocking HTTP/tmux calls in handle_info/handle_cast: research_ingestor (HTTP), memories_bridge (HTTP), agent_process (tmux subprocess). Should use Task.async or Task.Supervisor.

subject: Fix weak typespecs (map/list/term)
description: 13 bare map(), 11 bare list(), 4 term() sites where specific types known. Define @type for event_map, session_summary, note, agent_registration. Fix Notes.ex (term->String.t), Validator.ex (tuple->typed).

subject: Replace 13 filter+map chains with for comprehensions
description: 13 Enum.filter |> Enum.map chains that should be for comprehensions per Elixir docs. Files: event_bridge, agent_health, queries, load_teams, spawn, load_tool_failures, session_state, team_supervisor, board, pipeline_graph, floor.

subject: Add @doc to 7 public functions in util.ex
description: blank_to_nil/1, empty_to_nil/1, maybe_put/3, split_csv/1, split_lines/1, parse_artifact_status/1, parse_mode/1 all missing @doc.

subject: Implement xterm.js for in-app tmux panel
description: Replace current ANSI-to-HTML rendering in tmux popup panel with xterm.js terminal emulator. Provides proper terminal rendering, scrollback, mouse support, selection, resize. See https://github.com/xtermjs/xterm.js/. Need: npm install @xterm/xterm, Phoenix hook to init Terminal instance, WebSocket or polling for pane output, attach to slideout panel.
done_when: tmux pane renders in xterm.js terminal widget

subject: Revamp tmux terminal panel with xterm.js
description: Full terminal panel redesign: (1) Press T to toggle panel, (2) Custom theme matching app, (3) Panel controls: 25%/50%/75%/100% size, align bottom/top/left/right, float on top, hide not close, (4) Multiple tmux sessions in split panes (horizontal/vertical splits). Inspired by VS Code integrated terminal.
notes: Implemented as component + JS hook. Replaces old modal. T-key toggle, 5 positions, 5 sizes, session tabs, drag resize, localStorage persistence.

subject: Add prompt CRUD to workshop playground
description: Workshop playground missing prompt management: (1) Prompts tab showing TeamPrompts/PipelinePrompts/PlanningPrompts templates, (2) Per-agent compiled prompt preview (PromptProtocol.critical_rules + roster + mode content), (3) prompt_module selector per team (AD-6), (4) Editable prompt sections with live preview of composed output.
